page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A Novel Multiplatform Framework to Compute Tensor Algebra-Based Three-Dimensional Protein Descriptors.

MuLiMs-MCoMPAs software is for the calculation of 3D bio macromolecular (protein and peptide) descriptors based on the two-linear and three-linear algebraic.

…methods and tools for Chem-Bio-Med-Informatic Studies.
